summary: Project involves a logo with the text 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' — user wants the spelling corrected from 'umheed' to 'ummeed' inside the logo.
known_issues: Logo contains misspelling 'umheed' that needs to be corrected to 'ummeed'
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Change the bottom text inside the circular logo from 'Ek Nayi Umheed' to 'Ek Nayi Ummeed', keeping all other visual elements unchanged (sclc-logo-v2.dim_400x400.png > sclc-logo-v2.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Generate a new version of the uploaded logo image (sclc-logo-v2.dim_400x400.png) where the text 'Ek Nayi Umheed' at the bottom of the circular logo is corrected to read 'Ek Nayi Ummeed', keeping all other visual elements (brain illustration, hands, circular border, 'Sisodiya Child Learning Centre' text) identical.
